xml.introduction: The episode begins at Iceberg Lake where Finn is lighting a flamethrower with a flambit

line.dialogue: Yeah! Laughs and torches an iceberg Yeah!

line.stage: The iceberg melts, exposing several objects inside

line.dialogue: I found another bike and more computers. What do you got?
I keep finding baby shoes!

line.stage: Jake torches an iceberg with his flamethrower and exposes more baby shoes

line.dialogue: WHAT THE HECK, MAN?! And they're all lefties! Sorry I'm not finding any loot.
Keep it together, chubby, because I think we found enough scrap to finish building our gauntlet dock; a dock that is also a gauntlet.
Aww. Building this gauntlet dock is hard, man. Hard work sucks.
Don't be lazy, Jake.

line.stage: There's a bubbling noise coming from the lake behind Finn and Jake

line.dialogue: Huh?
Incoming iceberg!
Whoa! That one's huge!
I got dibs! Ooo. I hope it's not baby shoes.

line.stage: Jake wipes the surface of the ice, which reveals a face within the ice

line.dialogue: Gasps It's a guy.
Creepy. It's a buncha guys.
You know what they remind me of? Well-dressed pickles.
Stand back, Jake! I'm gonna melt 'em outta there! Full charge.

line.stage: Finn blasts a huge flame out of his flamethrower and Jake runs up to stop him

line.dialogue: Whoa, don't roast 'em, man. You gotta flambé.

line.stage: Jake gently brushes the flame across the iceberg and it soon melts

line.dialogue: Ah. Perfecto. Bon appetit.
Hey! Can you hear me? Hello?
Knocking on one of their heads I don't think they made it.
Hey. Reaching for a briefcase This one's got some kind of pack.

line.stage: One of them comes to life and pushes Finn away; Finn screams

line.dialogue: I remember... business.
Let go! Let go! Let go!
We... are Business Men.
Oooh... Well, I'm Finn and he's Jake.
What kind of business do you do?
Been frozen... so long, I... The businessmen all shake their heads, as if in pain can't remember. Can't remember! Oh. Looking for help, your business? We love work for you.
Nah. Adventurers don't need any help.
Yes! Help us fix that dock.
Dock-ka?
Yeah! Right over there.
Yes. This dock-ka... could be more... efficient.
No! Wait!

line.stage: The businessmen reel back and murmur as if frightened

line.dialogue: Jake, this dock is our fun pie. We should be the ones to bake it.
But they're begging for it, Finn. Just look at 'em.

line.stage: The businessmen look excited and several of them are drooling

line.dialogue: Murmuring Build dock. Build dock.
Finn. These poor souls are lost without jobs. We can't ignore their plight.
Uhh...
To the businessmen Go on guys, fix it up!
Woo!

line.stage: The businessmen murmur excitedly as they run over to the dock and begin building

line.dialogue: Well... they do seem really happy to do it.
Of course, man. They said they "love work for you."
In unison Uhh... We finish.

line.stage: The camera zooms out to show a completed gauntlet dock

line.dialogue: Whoa!
Told ya so.
Come on! Let's try it out!

line.stage: Finn and Jake run through the gauntlet dock, avoiding the traps and obstacles, while Finn screams excitedly
At the end of the dock, Finn and Jake jump into the water

line.dialogue: Laughing Yeah! Woo!
Laughing Yeah! Woo! Panting See? If we hire them full time, they'll be back in business and we'll be able to focus on fun stuff. Everybody wins!
Maybe you're right.
To the businessmen You hear that, guys? Maybe I'm right!
Really? Job? With... ad-ven-tur-ers?
Yeah, mans!

line.stage: The businessmen cheer and dance

xml.line: The red-tie businessman throws down his briefcase and chisels "Fin [sic & Jake Adventuring Incorporated" into the side]

line.stage: The scene changes to the Tree Fort where the businessmen are cleaning weapons, ironing socks and shining shoes
Jake is playing a video game on BMO

line.dialogue: Feels weird doing nothing.
Relax, man. This is your day off.
From far in the distance Help! Somebody help!
Trouble, dude! Get your axe! I'll get my... wha?
Adventure pack... ready for you.
Hey, thanks man.

line.stage: The scene changes to Finn and Jake running across the Grass Lands, weapons in hand

line.dialogue: I have to say, Jake. My sword is totally shiny and stinkin' sharp!
Uh huh.
Even my shoes feel different. Not only are they clean, I feel radder, faster, more... adequate.
Cool!

line.stage: The businessmen are running behind Finn and Jake, writing notes
A battle cube is chasing Hot Dog Princess

line.dialogue: Help!
Don't cry, Hot Dog Princess! Jake and I will fend off these battle cubes!

line.stage: The businessmen sit off to the side and continue to take notes while eating donuts and drinking coffee
Finn and Jake begin to fight the battle cubes, which are flying around Hot Dog Princess' kingdom
The scene fades to a later time, where everyone is tired from fighting and Hot Dog Princess is taking a nap

line.dialogue: Man. I'm getting tired.
Groan Me too. These cubes are... frickin' resilient. Hey, business dudes! Hold off these cubes so we can catch our breath?
Jake! They don't know how to fight.

line.stage: The businessmen run over, wearing armor and wielding weapons; they begin fighting the battle cubes while Finn and Jake rest

line.dialogue: Offering bottled water and orange slices Water. Orange slices. Help rehydrate.

line.stage: Red-tie businessman runs back into battle, shouting

line.dialogue: These guys are great, right?
I gotta admit... they are helping. Surprised Oh! I think I figured out how to defeat the battle cubes!
That's 'cause you had time to rest your body and refresh your brain.
To businessmen Ok! We'll take it from here, guys!
Yeah! Good work.

line.stage: Finn and Jake run towards the battle cubes; Jake roars and grows large

line.dialogue: Grab all the cubes together!

line.stage: Jake stretches his hands to become giant and clasps them together, grabbing all the cubes

line.dialogue: Got 'em!

line.stage: Finn grunts and jumps into Jake's hands with a rope and ties all the battle cubes together into a single, large cube

line.dialogue: It worked!

line.stage: Jake throws the cubes off into the distances

line.dialogue: Wake up, Hot Dog Princess. You're free.
Oh! Thank you, Finn and Jake! Especially you, Finn.

line.stage: Hot Dog Princess stands on her hind legs and puckers her lips, as if to give Finn a kiss
Finn rears back, disgusted

line.dialogue: Whispering to Jake Ugh. She smells like old hot dog water.

line.stage: Jake giggles and the red-tie businessman runs in between Finn and Hot Dog Princess to take the kiss instead

line.dialogue: Whispering to Finn I take one for team.
This is awesome! You get a promotion, fella.

line.stage: Red-tie businessman cheers and dances

line.dialogue: Take one for team, too.

line.stage: The other businessmen begin kissing Hot Dog Princess
The scene changes to the Tree Fort where Finn and Jake are playing BMO

line.dialogue: Oh... Lost again!
Grabbing the controller My turn.

line.stage: Jake walks over to the businessmen, operating a large collection of wires and monitors

line.dialogue: What's that?

line.stage: Jake goes to the freezer and takes out a tub of ice cream

line.dialogue: Hero vision monitor. Use satellite to tell us world problems.
Oh, wow. Anything going on?
Just small things. You save stress for big thing.
Freakin' awesome, man.
What are they doing?
Takin' care of business.

line.stage: Jake eats a scoop of ice cream and Finn plays the video game

line.dialogue: Jake, hit me!

line.stage: Jake flings a scoop of ice cream into Finn's mouth
Time passes, showing more and more empty ice cream tubs stacked near Finn and Jake while both of them are getting fatter and fatter

line.dialogue: Mission complete.
Yeah!

line.stage: Finn and Jake get up and dance around, shaking their enormous guts

line.dialogue: We beat Adventure Master!
Holy moly!
We're adventure masters!
Woo! Yes!

line.stage: Finn and Jake both get tired and stop celebrating to take a breath

line.dialogue: Tired Ooo.
I never knew being fat and lazy was so rewarding.
Yeah. pushing around Finn's gut You're gut's so huge and moldable.
Hey!
Hold on a sec!
Laughs Man, that tickles.

line.stage: Jake manipulates Finn's gut to look like the Ice King

line.dialogue: Impersonating Ice King's voice I'm the Ice King, and I'll never find a bride because I'm such a tool.
Laughs Alright, let me try.

line.stage: Finn manipulates his gut to look like Princess Bubblegum

line.dialogue: Impersonating Princess Bubblegum's voice I'm Princess Bubblegum and I'm a dork, because I like science! I've also got a really annoying voice that Finn thinks is attractive!
Laughs That's a- Hey, what'd you say?
On a hero vision monitor, running from a Swamp Giant Ahh! Oh, my gosh! Leave me alone. All I said was "you're ugly," which is totally true. Somebody help me! Oh no!
Man, I am not in the mood for saving Lumpy Space Princess.
Hey, business dudes!

line.stage: The businessmen enter the room from various directions

line.dialogue: What do you guys think?
Hmm... Just one monster. We do.

line.stage: The businessmen run off

line.dialogue: Right. We'll just save our strength for the big adventures, then.

line.stage: Finn and Jake sit back down on their couch and relax

line.dialogue: Ahh. Nice call, dude.
Imagine how awesome the adventure's going to be when it's time for us to go out there.
I'm too tired to imagine stuff, but I bet you're right.
Both grabbing a tub of ice cream and toasting with them To being great adventurers!

line.stage: They both begin eating ice cream; time passes and shows that they have empty tubs and ice cream all over their faces. They are even fatter, and Finn's gut is now visible outside his shirt
Finn and Jake both groan and waiver until they fall over

line.dialogue: Oh, gosh.
Help us!
Huh? Jake! Did you hear that?
Yeah. Let the businessmen handle it.
Help! Please!
I heard it again.
businessmen, dude.
Heeeeeelp!

line.stage: Finn walks over to the window and gasps, seeing the businessmen in a large robot, sucking up Fuzzy Friends into a container

line.dialogue: Through a PA system Woo-hoo! Woo!
Jake! We messed up! The businessmen have gone bat-crazy, dude!
Still lying on the floor Man, just let the businessmen handle it.
THE BUSINESSMEN ARE THE PROBLEM, you lazy plug-hole!
Opens his eyes, surprised Huh?
Yelling out the window Guys!

line.stage: Finn begins to climb out the window and down to the bottom of the Tree Fort

line.dialogue: Guys, stop it!
Running up to the businessmen's robot Stop it, guys!
Stop what, boss?
You're jacking up those Fuzzy Friends!
But... We're being heroes. Like you, boss. We're protecting them. Collecting them in our care-sack so they cannot be hurt. It's the most efficient way to save people.
But you're making them unhappy!
Irrelevant! These people are in our care-sack. Their happiness is not priority.
I am your boss! And you guys are all fired!

line.stage: The businessmen begin to murmur to each other

line.dialogue: Fi-red?

line.stage: The businessmen shout angrily and start sucking up the Fuzzy Friends even faster than before
They move their robot and it crushes one of the Fuzzy Friends

line.dialogue: Nooo! Alright, guys. Now I've gotta take you down... Finn style.

line.stage: Finn runs over to kick their robot, and gets sucked up into the care-sack

line.dialogue: I'm kicking your care-sack, dudes!
Finn? Whoa... Crud.

line.stage: Jake squeezes his enormous gut out the window

line.dialogue: I'm comin' buddy!

line.stage: Jake flops onto the ground, still holding a tub of ice cream

line.dialogue: Ahh. I'm so fat, dude; I don't know what to do.
Gasp That's it! Jake! Demoralize them!
What? Why?
Do it, man! I have a legit plan!
Ok, Alright. To businessmen Hey! You guys are horrible at business!

line.stage: The businessmen lash about angrily and try to suck Jake up into their care-sack, but he's too fat to fit

line.dialogue: Huh? They're sucking me up, dude!
Now, eat that ice cream some more to become fatter, while also using your Stretchy Powers to grow huge!

line.stage: Jake chows down on the ice cream and starts getting bigger

line.dialogue: lifting his head up for a second Ok!

line.stage: Jake uses his Stretchy Powers as he gets pulled into the robot

line.dialogue: This sucks.
Yeah, dude! Keep growin'! You're breaking apart their robot!

line.stage: The robot begins to shake violently, the businessmen scream

line.dialogue: Oh no!

line.stage: The robot explodes and Finn, Jake and the businessmen go flying into the air

line.dialogue: Attempting to grab Finn I'm going to kill you, not-boss!
Wait, man! Wait! I wanna re-hire you guys!
Re-hire? Really?
Yeah, mans.
Woo hoo!

line.stage: As they all fall back to the ground, the businessmen and Finn grasp hands and form a five-point star
The scene changes to a beach, where Finn, Jake and the Fuzzy Friends are waving towards the water

line.dialogue: Yay! Hip-hip hooray! Pancakes!

line.stage: The businessmen are once again frozen in an iceberg and float back out to the middle of the lake

line.dialogue: So, wait... What'd you hire them to do?
I hired them to stuff themselves in that iceberg and get outta here.
Sigh I'm gonna miss 'em. And I'm gonna miss this gut.

line.stage: Jake uses his Stretchy Powers to return to his normal size

line.dialogue: Laughs I'm gonna miss my gut too.

line.stage: Finn strains and attempts to suck in his gut like Jake, but it doesn't disappear

line.dialogue: Huh? Aww...

xml.credits: The episode ends with a stark close-up of Finn's frowning face with "The End" on it
